ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 78,8% yoghurt (pasteurisert melk, pasteurisert flote, yoghurtkultur), 15% salt karamellblanding (sukker, 16% salt karamell (glukosesirup, smør, fløte), modifisert stivelse (mais, potet), stabilisator: pektin og guar gummi, naturlig aroma, brent sukker - sirup, surhetsregulerende middel: natriumsitrat, melkesyre og kalsium - sitrat, salt), 6,2% mørk sjokolade (49,5% kakaomasse, sukker, dekstrose, emulgator: soyalecithin)
